summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3-step wizard refactoring for Nova Oferta. All requirements successfully implemented and working perfectly. Backend supports 'regras' field, frontend wizard flows correctly through all 3 steps with proper navigation and preview functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (17/17 tests passed)
Backend 'regras' field creation and retrieval for 3-step wizard support
Step 1: Basic info form with step indicator 1/3 and 'Próximo: Regras de Uso' button
Step 1: All required fields present (Título, Preço Original, Preço Desconto, Descrição, Photo upload)
Step 1: Profile banner shows establishment data from profile
Step 2: Rules form with step indicator 2/3 and regras textarea
Step 2: Navigation buttons 'Voltar' and 'Próximo: Preview' working correctly
Step 3: Preview with step indicator 3/3 and live preview card
Step 3: Preview shows establishment name and location (from profile)
Step 3: Preview shows title, prices with % discount badge calculation
Step 3: Preview shows description and rules section with proper formatting
Step 3: Navigation buttons 'Voltar' and 'Publicar Oferta' working correctly
Backward and forward navigation between all steps working perfectly
Final submission creates offer successfully and returns to home page
New offer appears in home page list with 'Tem regras de uso' indicator
StableImageContainer prevents DOM manipulation errors during AI image generation
All step indicators show correct progress (1/3, 2/3, 3/3)
Only Step 3 has 'Publicar Oferta' button as required

success_percentage.backend: 100% (17/17 tests passed - including new regras field tests)
